context: A woman enjoys a brisk run through a quiet forest trail near a small brook.

actions.description: The runner appears on the winding trail, framed by trees and scattered sunlight.
She maintains a brisk pace, ponytail bouncing as orange fabric catches the light.
She continues past the camera path while the brook and leaves add calm background movement.
